diagnosis.root_cause: Inconsistent data entry or system integration issues may be leading to missing values in the loan_amnt column.
diagnosis.business_impact: The high null rate can skew analytics and reporting, potentially resulting in inaccurate forecasting and impaired decision-making for loan offerings.

suggestions.rationale: Replacing null values with the median is a reliable method to maintain data distribution and reduce bias in analytics.
suggestions.caveats: This assumes that the distribution of loan amounts is not heavily skewed, which may not be true in all cases.

suggestions.rationale: Using the mean to fill null values can be effective, especially if the data is approximately normally distributed.
suggestions.caveats: This method can distort the original data distribution if outliers are present.

suggestions.rationale: No remediation will be applied, and this decision is recorded for auditing purposes.
suggestions.caveats: The issue with null values remains unresolved.
